sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking dark red box
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

before_seg = before.segmentation
after_seg = after.segmentation

# Find differences
before_nodes = {n['hash']: n for n in before_seg['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['hash']: n for n in after_seg['nodes']}

print("=== Left-side objects AFTER ===")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    r1, c1 = min(p[0] for p in b), min(p[1] for p in b)
    r2, c2 = max(p[0] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
    if c2 < 32 and n['pixels'] > 1:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{r1},{c1}]-[{r2},{c2}]")

print("\n=== Right-side objects AFTER ===")
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    r1, c1 = min(p[0] for p in b), min(p[1] for p in b)
    r2, c2 = max(p[0] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b)
    if c1 >= 32:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, px={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{r1},{c1}]-[{r2},{c2}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
